message:
fix(grpc): improve determinism and correctness in health, reflection, and web modules

- src/grpc/health.rs: Make HealthService::services() return results in sorted
  order for deterministic API responses. Update test to assert exact sorted
  order rather than just membership, catching accidental ordering regressions.

- src/grpc/reflection.rs: Tighten reflection service response handling for
  consistency with updated health service patterns.

- src/grpc/web.rs: Improve gRPC-Web content-type detection and response
  framing for better interoperability with browser-based gRPC clients.

- tests/grpc_production_features.rs: Update integration tests to match the
  new deterministic service listing behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
